content.name: Unassigned Plus
content.author: Chem O`Dun
content.description: Adds an [b]Unassigned Plus[/b] tab to the [b]Property Owned[/b] menu in the map, placed next to the vanilla [b]Unassigned Ships[/b] tab. A dropdown at the top of the tab lets you auto-group unassigned ships into folders by Purpose, Size, or combinations of both.
